zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Conyers於1423年出生在英國越可爾宏比 卡素時，她的父親Sir Christopher Conyers40歲，母親Ellyn Rolleston26歲。她於1400年與Phillip Dymoke在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比結婚。她去世於1485年6月22日在英國越可爾斯尼恩享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯尼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Conyers于1423年出生在英国越可爾宏比 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Conyers40岁，母亲Ellyn Rolleston26岁。她于1400年与Phillip Dymoke在英国英格兰林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比结婚。她去世于1485年6月22日在英国越可爾斯尼恩享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾斯尼恩。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Conyers was born in 1423, in Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Christopher Conyers, was 40 and her mother, Ellyn Rolleston, was 26. She married Phillip Dymoke in 1400, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 22 June 1485, in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Conyers est née en 1423, à Hornby Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher Conyers, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ellyn Rolleston, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Phillip Dymoke en 1400, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1485, à Spennithorne, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 커k비 인 애스h필드
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers(이)가 1423년 영국 요르크실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Conyers(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellyn Rolleston(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 Phillip Dymoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1485년 6월 22일 영국 요르크실르 스펜이토른에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스펜이토른에 묻혔다.

ru.Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Eng: киркби ин ашфиелд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Conyers родилась в 1423 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Conyers было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellyn Rolleston, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Phillip Dymoke в 1400 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 22 июня 1485 г. в местности спеннитаурн, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности спеннитаурн, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
